_comment: MCP Server Configuration Template - Full (11 servers: 7 global + 4 project-scoped)
_usage: Copy into ~/.claude.json under 'mcpServers' key (global) and projects["<path>"].mcpServers (project-scoped). Replace all <PLACEHOLDER> values with your actual credentials and paths.

_placeholders.<YOUR_ZHIPU_API_KEY>: ZhiPu (BigModel) API key from https://open.bigmodel.cn/ - used for web-reader, web-search-prime, zread, zai-mcp-server
_placeholders.<YOUR_MINERU_API_KEY>: MinerU (OpenXLab) JWT token from https://mineru.openxlab.org.cn/ - used for mineru-mcp
_placeholders.<YOUR_PDF_MCP_PATH>: Absolute path to pdf-mcp server.js entry point, e.g. C:/Users/<you>/.claude/mcp-servers/pdf-mcp/src/server.js
_placeholders.<YOUR_MEMPALACE_PYTHON>: Absolute path to Python executable in the mempalace conda env, e.g. F:/anaconda/envs/mempalace/python.exe

projectMcpServers._comment: These go under projects["<your-project-path>"] in .claude.json, not at the top level.
